query:
SELECT id, name, email, companyId, role FROM users 
WHERE email LIKE '%@delmack.com' 
  AND companyId != 'company_test_001'
ORDER BY name ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT id, name, email, companyId, role FROM users 
WHERE email LIKE '%@delmack.com' 
  AND companyId != 'company_test_001'
ORDER BY name ASC;
